Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Ralph Matthes

2022
*)

(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- defines a notion of binary products for displayed categories that gives binary products on its total category
- same programme for terminal objects

 ************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.

Section FixDispCat.

  Context {C : category} (D : disp_cat C).

  Definition is_dispBinProduct_naive (c d p : C) (p1 : p --> c) (p2 : p --> d) (cc : D c)
    (dd : D d) (pp : D p) (pp1 : pp -->[p1] cc) (pp2 : pp -->[p2] dd) : UU :=
    ∏ (a : C) (f : a --> c) (g : a --> d) (aa : D a) (ff : aa -->[f] cc) (gg : aa -->[g] dd),
      ∃! (fg : a --> p) (fgfg : aa -->[fg] pp),
      ∑ fgok : ((fg · p1 = f) × (fg · p2 = g)),
        (fgfg ;; pp1 = transportb _ (pr1 fgok) ff) × (fgfg ;; pp2 = transportb _ (pr2 fgok) gg).

  Definition is_dispBinProduct (c d : C) (P : BinProduct C c d)
    (cc : D c) (dd : D d) (pp : D (BinProductObject _ P))
    (pp1 : pp -->[BinProductPr1 _ P] cc) (pp2 : pp -->[BinProductPr2 _ P] dd) : UU :=
    ∏ (a : C) (f : a --> c) (g : a --> d) (aa : D a) (ff : aa -->[f] cc) (gg : aa -->[g] dd),
      ∃! (fgfg : aa -->[BinProductArrow _ P f g] pp),
      (fgfg ;; pp1 = transportb _ (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g) ff) ×
      (fgfg ;; pp2 = transportb _ (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g) gg).

  Definition dispBinProduct (c d : C) (P : BinProduct C c d) (cc : D c) (dd : D d) : UU :=
    ∑ pppp1pp2 : (∑ pp : D (BinProductObject _ P),
                     (pp -->[BinProductPr1 _ P] cc) × (pp -->[BinProductPr2 _ P] dd)),
        is_dispBinProduct c d P cc dd (pr1 pppp1pp2) (pr1 (pr2 pppp1pp2)) (pr2 (pr2 pppp1pp2)).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
dispBinProduct c d P cc dd

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
dispBinProduct c d P cc dd

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
is_dispBinProduct c d P cc dd (pr1 dBP_data)
  (pr12 dBP_data) (pr22 dBP_data)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
∃! fgfg : aa -->[
          BinProductArrow C P f g] pr1 dBP_data,
fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
× fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
  transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
∑
fgfg : aa -->[ BinProductArrow C P f g] pr1 dBP_data,
fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
× fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
  transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
(λ cntr : ∑
          fgfg : aa -->[
                 BinProductArrow C P f g] 
                 pr1 dBP_data,
          fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
          transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
            (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
          × fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
            transportb 
              (mor_disp aa dd)
              (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     fgfg : aa -->[
            BinProductArrow C P f g] 
            pr1 dBP_data,
     fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
     transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
       (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
     × fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
       transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
         (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
∑
fgfg : aa -->[ BinProductArrow C P f g] pr1 dBP_data,
fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
× fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
  transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
mediating a f g aa ff gg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
× mediating a f g aa ff gg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
  transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg

      abstract (split; apply LP).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
LP: locally_propositional D
dBP_data: ∑ pp : D P,
pp -->[ BinProductPr1 C P] cc
× pp -->[ BinProductPr2 C P] dd
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ f] cc
→ aa -->[ g] dd
  → aa -->[
    BinProductArrow C P f g] 
    pr1 dBP_data
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
(λ cntr : ∑
          fgfg : aa -->[
                 BinProductArrow C P f g] pr1 dBP_data,
          fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
          transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
            (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
          × fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
            transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
              (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     fgfg : aa -->[
            BinProductArrow C P f g] pr1 dBP_data,
     fgfg ;; pr12 dBP_data =
     transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
       (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff
     × fgfg ;; pr22 dBP_data =
       transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
         (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg,
 t = cntr)
  (mediating a f g aa ff gg,,
   make_dispBinProduct_locally_prop_subproof c d P cc
     dd LP dBP_data mediating a f g aa ff gg)
 abstract (intro t; apply subtypePath;
                [intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply homsets_disp | apply LP]).
  Defined.

  Definition dispBinProductObject {c d : C} (P : BinProduct C c d) {cc : D c} {dd : D d}
    (dP : dispBinProduct c d P cc dd) : D (BinProductObject _ P) := pr1 (pr1 dP).

  Definition dispBinProductPr1 {c d : C} (P : BinProduct C c d) {cc : D c} {dd : D d}
    (dP : dispBinProduct c d P cc dd) : dispBinProductObject P dP -->[BinProductPr1 _ P] cc :=
    pr1 (pr2 (pr1 dP)).

  Definition dispBinProductPr2 {c d : C} (P : BinProduct C c d) {cc : D c} {dd : D d}
    (dP : dispBinProduct c d P cc dd) : dispBinProductObject P dP -->[BinProductPr2 _ P] dd :=
    pr2 (pr2 (pr1 dP)).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
is_dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
  (dispBinProductObject P dP) (dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
  (dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
is_dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
  (dispBinProductObject P dP) (dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
  (dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

    exact (pr2 dP).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
aa -->[
BinProductArrow C P f g] dispBinProductObject P dP

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
aa -->[
BinProductArrow C P f g] dispBinProductObject P dP

    exact (pr1 (pr1 (is_dispBinProduct_dispBinProduct P dP _ _ _ _ ff gg))).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a)
(ff : aa -->[ f] cc) (gg : aa -->[ g] dd),
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a)
(ff : aa -->[ f] cc) (gg : aa -->[ g] dd),
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P a f g) ff

    exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (is_dispBinProduct_dispBinProduct P dP _ _ _ _ ff gg)))).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a)
(ff : aa -->[ f] cc) (gg : aa -->[ g] dd),
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (aa : D a)
(ff : aa -->[ f] cc) (gg : aa -->[ g] dd),
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
aa: D a
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P
                                    dP =
transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P a f g) gg

    exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 (is_dispBinProduct_dispBinProduct P dP _ _ _ _ ff gg)))).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
kk: xx -->[
BinProductArrow C P f g] dispBinProductObject P
                           dP
kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x f g) ff
→ kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
  transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x f g) gg
  → kk = dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
kk: xx -->[
BinProductArrow C P f g] dispBinProductObject P
                           dP
kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x f g) ff
→ kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
  transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
    (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x f g) gg
  → kk = dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
kk: xx -->[
BinProductArrow C P f g] dispBinProductObject P
                           dP
H1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x f g) ff
H2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x f g) gg
kk = dispBinProductArrow P dP ff gg

    apply path_to_ctr; split; assumption.
  Qed.


  (* transparent proofs for the standard binary products -- upstream?
  Definition BinProductArrowUnique' (c d : C) (P : BinProduct C c d) (x : C)
    (f : x --> c) (g : x --> d) (k : x --> BinProductObject C P) :
    k · BinProductPr1 C P = f -> k · BinProductPr2 C P = g ->
    k = BinProductArrow C P f g.
  Proof.
    intros; apply path_to_ctr; split; assumption.
  Defined.

  Definition BinProductArrowEta' (c d : C) (P : BinProduct C c d) (x : C)
    (f : x --> BinProductObject C P) :
    f = BinProductArrow C P (f · BinProductPr1 C P) (f · BinProductPr2 C P).
  Proof.
    apply BinProductArrowUnique'; apply idpath.
  Defined.
*)


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
fgfg =
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)
  (dispBinProductArrow P dP
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
fgfg =
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)
  (dispBinProductArrow P dP
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow P dP
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg ;; 
dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) 
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                P dP =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd

xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                P dP =
?b

D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd

xx: D x

fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) 
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))

  (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg) fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                P dP =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition fg
     (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
     (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition fg
     (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
     (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP) =
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
       (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
       (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
cancel_postcomposition fg
  (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
  (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)) =
! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d P x
    (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)

      apply C.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition fg
     (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)
     (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition fg
     (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)
     (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP) =
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x
       (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
       (fg · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
P: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dP: dispBinProduct c d P cc dd
x: C
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[ fg] dispBinProductObject P dP
cancel_postcomposition fg
  (BinProductArrow C P (fg · BinProductPr1 C P)
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)
  (! (! BinProductArrowEta C c d P x fg)) =
! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d P x
    (fg · BinProductPr1 C P) (fg · BinProductPr2 C P)

      apply C.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2)
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) = kk

D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b

k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2)
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) = kk

C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
kk = ?b
 apply dispBinProductArrowEta. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k)
  (dispBinProductArrow P dP
     (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
     (kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2)
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) =
dispBinProductArrow P dP
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C

aa: D a

(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                             P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                             P dP = 
?b
 apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
     (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
     (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
      ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k)))
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                            P dP) =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
     (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
     (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
      ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
     (id_left (BinProductPr1 C P))
     (dispBinProductPr1 P dP)) =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (! id_left (BinProductPr1 C P) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
     (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
        (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
     (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
      ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k)))
  (dispBinProductPr1 P dP) =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  ((! id_left (BinProductPr1 C P) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
      (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
         (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
      (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
       ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
   ! (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
          (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)))
  (dispBinProductPr1 P dP) =
kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C

(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  ((! id_left (BinProductPr1 C P) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
      (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
         (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
      (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
       ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
   ! (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
          (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)))
  (dispBinProductPr1 P dP) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b

kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[

dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =

H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =

(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
?b = kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
?b = kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP
 apply pathsinv0; exact dH1. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  ((! id_left (BinProductPr1 C P) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
      (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
         (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
      (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
       ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
   ! (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
          (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)))
  (dispBinProductPr1 P dP) =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  H1 (dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa)
  (((! id_left (BinProductPr1 C P) @
     cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
       (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr1 C P)
       (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
        ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
    ! (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b P P
           (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
           (k · BinProductPr2 C P))) @ ! (! H1))
  (dispBinProductPr1 P dP) = dispBinProductPr1 P dP

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))
  (id_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)) ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                             P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
P: BinProduct C a b
dP: dispBinProduct a b P aa bb
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[
k] dispBinProductObject P dP
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C a b P P
     (k · BinProductPr1 C P) (k · BinProductPr2 C P))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP)
     (dispBinProductObject P dP))
  (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
   ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))

                                             P dP =

 apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker.

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity P)

        (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)

                                            P dP) =

D: disp_cat C
a, b: C

(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)

dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb) H2
(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)
transportf (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) bb)
  ((! id_left (BinProductPr2 C P) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
      (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
         (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)
      (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
       ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
   ! (! BinProductPr2Commutes C a b P P
          (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)))

  H2 (dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

D: disp_cat C
a, b: C
aa: D a

kk: dispBinProductObject P dP -->[

H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
dH1: kk ;; dispBinProductPr1 P dP =
transportb (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject P dP) aa) H1
(dispBinProductPr1 P dP)
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
dH2: kk ;; dispBinProductPr2 P dP =

(dispBinProductPr2 P dP)

  (((! id_left (BinProductPr2 C P) @
     cancel_postcomposition (identity P)
       (BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
          (k · BinProductPr2 C P)) (BinProductPr2 C P)
       (BinProduct_endo_is_identity C a b P k H1 H2 @
        ! (! BinProductArrowEta C a b P P k))) @
    ! (! BinProductPr2Commutes C a b P P
           (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
           (k · BinProductPr2 C P))) @ ! (! H2))
  (dispBinProductPr2 P dP) = dispBinProductPr2 P dP

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition dispBinProductOfArrows {c d : C} {Pcd : BinProduct C c d}
    {cc : D c} {dd : D d}
    (dPcd : dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd)
    {a b : C} {Pab : BinProduct C a b}
    {aa : D a} {bb : D b}
    (dPab : dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb)
    {f : a --> c} {g : b --> d}
    (ff : aa -->[f] cc) (gg : bb -->[g] dd)
    : dispBinProductObject Pab dPab -->[BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g] dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd :=
    dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff) (dispBinProductPr2 Pab dPab ;; gg).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
dispBinProductOfArrows dPcd dPab ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                            Pcd dPcd =
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject Pab dPab) cc)
  (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)
  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

  
C: category

ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
dispBinProductOfArrows dPcd dPab ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                            Pcd dPcd =
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject Pab dPab) cc)
  (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)
  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

 apply dispBinProductPr1Commutes. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C

cc: D c
dd: D d

a, b: C

gg: bb -->[ g] dd
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject Pab dPab) cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd Pab
     (BinProductPr1 C Pab · f)
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab · g))
  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject Pab dPab) cc)
  (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)
  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd Pab
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab · f) (BinProductPr2 C Pab · g) =
BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g

    apply C.
  Qed.

  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd Pab
     (BinProductPr1 C Pab · f)

gg: bb -->[ g] dd

  (BinProductPr1 C Pab · f) (BinProductPr2 C Pab · g) =

    apply C.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                        dPcd dPab ff
                                        gg =
transportb
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd (kk ;; ff) (hh ;; gg))

  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg) ;; 
dispBinProductPr1 Pcd dPcd =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

   dispBinProductOfArrows dPcd dPab ff gg) ;;

  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg) ;;

 apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg ;; 
   dispBinProductPr1 Pcd dPcd) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd))
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; (dispBinProductOfArrows
                                               dPcd
                                               dPab ff
                                               gg ;; 
                                             dispBinProductPr1
                                               Pcd
                                               dPcd))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd))
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 (dispBinProductObject
                                                 Pab
                                                 dPab)
                                                 cc)
                                              (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                                 C Pcd
                                                 Pab f
                                                 g)
                                              (dispBinProductPr1
                                                 Pab
                                                 dPab ;; ff))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
     (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (dispBinProductObject
                                                 Pab
                                                 dPab)
                                              cc)
                                           (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                              C Pcd
                                              Pab f g)
                                           (dispBinProductPr1
                                              Pab dPab ;; ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))
  (kk ;; ff) =
dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (dispBinProductObject
                                              Pab dPab)
                                           cc)
                                        (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                           C Pcd Pab f
                                           g)
                                        (dispBinProductPr1
                                           Pab dPab ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))
  (kk ;; ff) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
?b =
dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; 
transportb
  (mor_disp (dispBinProductObject Pab dPab) cc)
  (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)
  (dispBinProductPr1 Pab dPab ;; ff)

dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (dispBinProductObject
                                              Pab dPab)
                                           cc)
                                        (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                           C Pcd Pab f
                                           g)

                                           Pab dPab ;; ff)
 apply pathsinv0, mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))
  (kk ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g))
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; (dispBinProductPr1
                                            Pab dPab ;; ff))

D: disp_cat C

dd: D d

f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧

xx: D x

h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)

  (maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pab) f)
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                              Pab dPab ;; ff))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b

f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧

gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))

transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pab) f)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx aa)
        (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b Pab x k h) kk ;; ff))

  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)

  ((! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
        (h · g) @
    ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
         (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
         (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
       cancel_postcomposition
         (BinProductArrow C Pab k h

         (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
         (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)

            h))) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
          (BinProductPr1 C Pab) f @
      maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
        (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)))
  (kk ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx aa)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C a b Pab x k h) kk ;; ff

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx aa)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b Pab x k h) kk ;; ff
 apply pathsinv0, mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  ((! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
        (h · g) @
    ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
         (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
         (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
       cancel_postcomposition
         (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
          · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
         (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
         (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
         (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k
            h))) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
          (BinProductPr1 C Pab) f @
      maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
        (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g)))
  (kk ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition k
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
     f (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b Pab x k h))
  (kk ;; ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (((! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
         (h · g) @
     ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
          (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
          (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
           · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
          (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
          (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
          (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k
             h))) @
    ! (! assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
           (BinProductPr1 C Pab) f @
       maponpaths
         (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
         (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C Pcd Pab f g))) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition k
       (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
        · BinProductPr1 C Pab) f
       (! BinProductPr1Commutes C a b Pab x k h))
  (kk ;; ff) = kk ;; ff

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg) ;; 
dispBinProductPr2 Pcd dPcd =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg) ;; 
dispBinProductPr2 Pcd dPcd = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg) ;; 
dispBinProductPr2 Pcd dPcd = ?b
 apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                           dPcd dPab
                                           ff gg ;; 
   dispBinProductPr2 Pcd dPcd) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd))
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; (dispBinProductOfArrows
                                               dPcd
                                               dPab ff
                                               gg ;; 
                                             dispBinProductPr2
                                               Pcd
                                               dPcd))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)

f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧

k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧

hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd))
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 (dispBinProductObject
                                                 Pab
                                                 dPab)
                                                 dd)
                                              (BinProductOfArrowsPr2
                                                 C Pcd
                                                 Pab f
                                                 g)
                                              (dispBinProductPr2
                                                 Pab
                                                 dPab ;; gg))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)

hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
     (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
      · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)

  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; transportb

                                              dd)

                                              C Pcd
                                              Pab f g)

                                              Pab dPab ;; gg)) =

  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g))
  (hh ;; gg)

hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @

dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;;

  (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C Pcd Pab f g)

                                        (mor_disp

                                              Pab dPab)

 apply pathsinv0, mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))
  (hh ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C Pcd Pab f g))
  (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; (dispBinProductPr2
                                            Pab dPab ;; gg))

x: C

hh: xx -->[ h] bb

  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
         · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
        (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k h)))
  (hh ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C Pcd Pab f g))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
     (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pab) g)
     (dispBinProductArrow Pab dPab kk hh ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                              Pab dPab ;; gg))

  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (h · g) @
   ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
        (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
        (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @

  (transportb (mor_disp xx dd)

kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx bb)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C a b Pab x k h) hh ;; gg
 apply pathsinv0, mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  ((! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
        (h · g) @
    ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
         (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
         (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
       cancel_postcomposition
         (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
          · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
         (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
         (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
         (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k
            h))) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
          (BinProductPr2 C Pab) g @
      maponpaths (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
        (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C Pcd Pab f g)))
  (hh ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (cancel_postcomposition h
     (BinProductArrow C Pab k h · BinProductPr2 C Pab)
     g (! BinProductPr2Commutes C a b Pab x k h))
  (hh ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
aa: D a
bb: D b
dPab: dispBinProduct a b Pab aa bb
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: bb -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
hh: xx -->[ h] bb
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (((! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
         (h · g) @
     ! (assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
          (BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
          (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
           · BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g)
          (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
          (postcompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd Pab f g k
             h))) @
    ! (! assoc (BinProductArrow C Pab k h)
           (BinProductPr2 C Pab) g @
       maponpaths
         (compose (BinProductArrow C Pab k h))
         (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C Pcd Pab f g))) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition h
       (BinProductArrow C Pab k h
        · BinProductPr2 C Pab) g
       (! BinProductPr2Commutes C a b Pab x k h))
  (hh ;; gg) = hh ;; gg

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
kk ;; dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg =
transportb
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd (kk ;; ff) (kk ;; gg))

aa: D a

ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
kk ;; dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg =
transportb
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k)
  (dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd (kk ;; ff) (kk ;; gg))

D: disp_cat C

dd: D d

a: C
aa: D a

gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k)
  (kk ;; dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg) =
dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd (kk ;; ff) (kk ;; gg)

a: C
aa: D a

ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd

transportf
  (mor_disp xx (dispBinProductObject Pcd dPcd))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k)
  (kk ;; dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg) ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                 Pcd
                                                 dPcd =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

c, d: C

a: C
aa: D a

g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (kk ;; dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                 Pcd
                                                 dPcd) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

D: disp_cat C

dd: D d

a: C
aa: D a

gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x

kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
     (assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
        (BinProductPr1 C Pcd))
     (kk ;; (dispBinProductArrow Pcd dPcd ff gg ;; 
             dispBinProductPr1 Pcd dPcd))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

gg: aa -->[ g] dd

        (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) ff =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
  (assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx cc)
     (maponpaths (compose k)
        (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd a f g))
     (kk ;; ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; ff)

  (maponpaths (compose k)
     (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) @
   assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))

    assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)

   ! (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
          (k · g))) (kk ;; ff) = kk ;; ff

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
