     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (kk ;; transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
           (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) gg) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (kk ;; transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
           (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) gg) =
?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
kk ;; transportb (mor_disp aa dd)
        (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) gg =
?t2

        apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
     (maponpaths (compose k)
        (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g))
     (kk ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  (maponpaths (compose k)
     (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) @
   assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
     (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k))
  (kk ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp xx dd)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f) (k · g))
  (kk ;; gg)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
cc: D c
dd: D d
dPcd: dispBinProduct c d Pcd cc dd
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
gg: aa -->[ g] dd
x: C
xx: D x
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
kk: xx -->[ k] aa
transportf (mor_disp xx dd)
  ((maponpaths (compose k)
      (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd a f g) @
    assoc k (BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
      (BinProductPr2 C Pcd) @
    cancel_postcomposition
      (k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g)
      (BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g))
      (BinProductPr2 C Pcd)
      (precompWithBinProductArrow C Pcd f g k)) @
   ! (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d Pcd x (k · f)
          (k · g))) (kk ;; gg) = kk ;; gg

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
  Qed.


  Definition dispBinProducts (Ps : BinProducts C)  : UU := ∏ (c d : C) (cc : D c) (dd : D d),
      dispBinProduct c d (Ps c d) cc dd.


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd) (dPs a b aa bb)
  ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs x y xx yy)
              (dPs c d cc dd) gg gg' =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs x y xx yy)
     (dPs a b aa bb) (ff ;; gg) (ff' ;; gg'))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd) (dPs a b aa bb)
  ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs x y xx yy)
              (dPs c d cc dd) gg gg' =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs x y xx yy)
     (dPs a b aa bb) (ff ;; gg) (ff' ;; gg'))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') =
dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs x y xx yy) (dPs a b aa bb)
  (ff ;; gg) (ff' ;; gg')

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) = 
?b
 apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg' ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                          (Ps x y)
                                          (dPs x y xx
                                             yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        xx)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)))
     (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
        (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; (dispBinProductOfArrows
                                     (dPs x y xx yy)
                                     (dPs c d cc dd)
                                     gg gg' ;; dispBinProductPr1
                                                 (Ps x
                                                 y)
                                                 (dPs
                                                 x y
                                                 xx yy)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        xx)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)))
     (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
        (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; transportb
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (dispBinProductObject
                                          (Ps c d)
                                          (dPs c d cc
                                             dd)) xx)
                                    (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                       C (Ps x y)
                                       (Ps c d) g g')
                                    (dispBinProductPr1
                                       (Ps c d)
                                       (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (assoc (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; transportb
                                 (mor_disp
                                    (dispBinProductObject
                                       (Ps c d)
                                       (dPs c d cc dd))
                                    xx)
                                 (BinProductOfArrowsPr1
                                    C (Ps x y)
                                    (Ps c d) g g')
                                 (dispBinProductPr1
                                    (Ps c d)
                                    (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg)) =
dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd) (dPs a b aa bb)
  ff ff' ;; transportb
              (mor_disp
                 (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
                    (dPs c d cc dd)) xx)
              (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps x y)
                 (Ps c d) g g')
              (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                 (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg)

ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg)) =
?b

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff ;; gg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; (dispBinProductPr1
                                  (Ps c d)
                                  (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg))

transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'

        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        xx) (assoc (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b)) f g)
     (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)

                                    (Ps c d)

     (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg)) =

yy: D y

ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! assoc (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b)) f g @
   ! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'

        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)

transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (! assoc
       (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))

        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        cc)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b)) f g @
      ! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        cc)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff) ;; gg) =
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg

  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))

           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f

           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))

  (transportb

bb: D b
cc: D c

xx: D x
yy: D y

g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧

transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b)) f g @
      ! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · f)
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g
        (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
             f'))
     (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg)) =
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · f)
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f') @
   (! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr1 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b)) f g @
      ! BinProductPr1Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg) =
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff ;; gg

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps x y) (dPs x y xx yy)))
  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg') ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                           (Ps x y)
                                           (dPs x y xx
                                              yy) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

  (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g g')

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductOfArrows
                                 (dPs x y xx yy)
                                 (dPs c d cc dd) gg
                                 gg' ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                          (Ps x y)
                                          (dPs x y xx
                                             yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)))
     (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
        (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; (dispBinProductOfArrows
                                     (dPs x y xx yy)
                                     (dPs c d cc dd)
                                     gg gg' ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                                 (Ps x
                                                 y)
                                                 (dPs
                                                 x y
                                                 xx yy)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)))
     (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
        (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; transportb
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (dispBinProductObject
                                          (Ps c d)
                                          (dPs c d cc
                                             dd)) yy)
                                    (BinProductOfArrowsPr2
                                       C (Ps x y)
                                       (Ps c d) g g')
                                    (dispBinProductPr2
                                       (Ps c d)
                                       (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg'))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (assoc (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
     (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
        (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
     (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f' g
        g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; transportb
                                 (mor_disp
                                    (dispBinProductObject
                                       (Ps c d)
                                       (dPs c d cc dd))
                                    yy)
                                 (BinProductOfArrowsPr2
                                    C (Ps x y)
                                    (Ps c d) g g')
                                 (dispBinProductPr2
                                    (Ps c d)
                                    (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg')) =
dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd) (dPs a b aa bb)
  ff ff' ;; transportb
              (mor_disp
                 (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
                    (dPs c d cc dd)) yy)
              (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y)
                 (Ps c d) g g')
              (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                 (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg')

g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg')) =
?b

                    (dPs c d cc dd)) yy)
              (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y)
                 (Ps c d) g g')

g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧

ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; (ff' ;; gg')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g'))
  (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
     (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; (dispBinProductPr2
                                  (Ps c d)
                                  (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy) (assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g'))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g')
     (dispBinProductOfArrows (dPs c d cc dd)
        (dPs a b aa bb) ff ff' ;; dispBinProductPr2
                                    (Ps c d)
                                    (dPs c d cc dd) ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy) (assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g'))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy)
     (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g')
     (transportb
        (mor_disp
           (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b)
              (dPs a b aa bb)) dd)
        (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
           f')
        (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg'))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
   ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
   ! (assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g')
        (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
           (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
        (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f f'
           g g')))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg') =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (! assoc
       (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
       (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g g'))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        dd)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg')

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
      ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        dd)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg') =
dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
      ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        dd)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg') =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧

g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧

ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
?b =
dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
      ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        dd)
     (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg') =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     dd)
  (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff') ;; gg' =
?t2

        apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  ((! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
      ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
        yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · f')
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
         · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g'
        (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
             f'))
     (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg')) =
dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] cc
ff': bb -->[ f'] dd
gg: cc -->[ g] xx
gg': dd -->[ g'] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb))
     yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · f')
     (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'
      · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g'
     (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f') @
   (! assoc
        (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f')
        (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)) g' @
    maponpaths
      (compose
         (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f f'))
      (! BinProductOfArrowsPr2 C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
           g')) @
   ! (! assoc (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b)) f' g' @
      ! BinProductPr2Commutes C x y (Ps x y) (Ps a b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
          (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')) @
      ! (assoc
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f')
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
              g') (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y)) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (BinProductOfArrows C (Ps c d) (Ps a b) f
              f'
            · BinProductOfArrows C (Ps x y) (Ps c d) g
                g')
           (BinProductArrow C (Ps x y)
              (BinProductPr1 C (Ps a b) · (f · g))
              (BinProductPr2 C (Ps a b) · (f' · g')))
           (BinProductPr2 C (Ps x y))
           (BinProductOfArrows_comp C Ps a b c d x y f
              f' g g'))))
  (dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg') =
dispBinProductPr2 (Ps a b) (dPs a b aa bb) ;; ff' ;; gg'

      apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
        try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
∑ p : total_category D,
total_category D ⟦ p, ccc ⟧
× total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧

Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps

× total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧

c: C

× total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧

  d,, dd ⟧

 f] pr2 (c,, cc)) ?pr1

D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
C
⟦ pr1
    (Ps c d,,
     dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)),
pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
 apply BinProductPr1.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
(λ f : C
       ⟦ pr1
           (Ps c d,,
            dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
              (dPs c d cc dd)), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧,
 pr2
   (Ps c d,,
    dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) -->[
 f] pr2 (c,, cc)) (BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
 apply dispBinProductPr1.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
total_category D
⟦ Ps c d,,
  dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd),
d,, dd ⟧

D: disp_cat C

dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C

d: C
dd: D d
C
⟦ pr1
    (Ps c d,,
     dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)),
pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧

Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps

cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
(λ f : C
       ⟦ pr1
           (Ps c d,,
            dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
              (dPs c d cc dd)), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧,
 pr2
   (Ps c d,,
    dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) -->[
 f] pr2 (d,, dd)) ?pr1

       ⟦ pr1

              (dPs c d cc dd)), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧,
 pr2
   (Ps c d,,
    dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) -->[
 f] pr2 (d,, dd)) (BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
 apply dispBinProductPr2.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
∑ h : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
xx -->[
h] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)

C: category
D: disp_cat C

xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
 apply BinProductArrow; assumption.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
(λ h : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
 xx -->[
 h] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g)
 apply dispBinProductArrow; assumption.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = f,, ff
× BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
  · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
  dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = g,, gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = f,, ff
× BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
  · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
  dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = g,, gg

· BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,

dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = f,, ff

· BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
transportf (pr2 D x c xx cc) ?Goal0
  (dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
   dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
 apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
transportf (pr2 D x c xx cc)
  (BinProductPr1Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g)
  (dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
   dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
transportf (pr2 D x c xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g) ff =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)

        
C: category

gg: xx -->[ g] dd
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
transportf (pr2 D x c xx cc)
  (! BinProductPr1Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g) ff

        apply dispBinProductPr1Commutes.

 apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
      
C: category

  (BinProductPr2Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g)
  (dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
   dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = gg

  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g) gg =

C: category

dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg ;; 
dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
transportf (pr2 D x d xx dd)
  (! BinProductPr2Commutes C c d (Ps c d) x f g) gg

        apply dispBinProductPr2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
f,, ff
× fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
  g,, gg
→ fg,, fgfg =
  total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
    ff gg

× fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
            (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = 
  g,, gg

fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
          (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = 
f,, ff
H2: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1: fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
          (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = 
f,, ff
H2: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
          (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) = 
g,, gg
H1l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (f,, ff)
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (f,, ff)
fg,, fgfg =
total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
  ff gg

fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2

  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =

H1r: transportf

      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d)

  (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2

  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (g,, gg)
fg,, fgfg =
total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
  ff gg

D: disp_cat C

      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)

  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =

  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
