fg,, fgfg =
total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
  ff gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (f,, ff)
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (f,, ff)
H2l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (g,, gg)
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (g,, gg)
fg = BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (f,, ff)
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (f,, ff)
H2l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (g,, gg)
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (g,, gg)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  ?Goal fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (f,, ff)
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (f,, ff)
H2l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (g,, gg)
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (g,, gg)
fg = BinProductArrow C (Ps c d) f g
 use path_to_ctr; split; assumption.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (f,, ff)
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (f,, ff)
H2l: pr1
  (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) =
pr1 (g,, gg)
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (pr2
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))) = 
pr2 (g,, gg)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
      × fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x f g) fg
     (H1l,, H2l)) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = ff
H2l: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = gg
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
      × fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x f g) fg
     (H1l,, H2l)) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) ff gg

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] cc
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] dd
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
H1r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0) H1l
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = ff
H2l: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g
H2r: transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0) H2l
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)) = gg
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
      × fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x f g) fg
     (H1l,, H2l)) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0)
     H1l
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0)
     H2l
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H1l: fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
H2l: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) = f
      × fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x f g) fg
     (H1l,, H2l)) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0)
     H1l
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0)
     H2l
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
H2l: fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
      × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) = g)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
        (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)) g) fg
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),, H2l))
  fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0)
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)))
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0)
     H2l
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
      × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) =
        fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
        (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) fg
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),,
      idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)))) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, pr2 D x c xx cc x0)
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)))
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, pr2 D x d xx dd x0)
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)))
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                (dPs c d cc dd)))

      (* apply dispBinProductArrowEta. would work with [BinProductArrowEta'] *)
      (* we proceed as follows: *)
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
      × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) =
        fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
        (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) fg
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),,
      idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)))) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
      × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) =
        fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
        (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) fg
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),,
      idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)))) fgfg =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
?b =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) 
  (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
?b =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
aux: fgfg =
transportb
  (mor_disp xx
     (dispBinProductObject 
        (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (BinProductArrowEta C c d (Ps c d) x fg)
  (dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) 
     (dPs c d cc dd)
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd))
     (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
                (Ps c d) 
                (dPs c d cc dd)))
?b =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))

           
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
aux: transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (dispBinProductObject 
        (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (BinProductArrowEta C c d (Ps c d) x fg) fgfg =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) 
  (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 
             (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
?b =
dispBinProductArrow (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))
  (fgfg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd))

           exact aux. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
transportf
  (pr2 D x (Ps c d) xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
     (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
      fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
      fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
      × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) =
        fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
        (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
        (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) fg
     (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),,
      idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d)))) fgfg =
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)))
  (BinProductArrowEta C c d (Ps c d) x fg) fgfg

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c, d, x: C
cc: D c
dd: D d
xx: D x
fg: C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: xx -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
path_to_ctr (C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧)
  (λ fg0 : C ⟦ x, Ps c d ⟧,
   fg0 · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d) =
   fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)
   × fg0 · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d) =
     fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))
  (isBinProduct_BinProduct C (Ps c d) x
     (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d))
     (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) fg
  (idpath (fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d)),,
   idpath (fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d))) =
BinProductArrowEta C c d (Ps c d) x fg

      apply C.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
BinProducts (total_category D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
BinProducts (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
BinProduct (total_category D) ccc ddd

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
∑ p : total_category D,
total_category D ⟦ p, ccc ⟧
× total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : total_category D,
           total_category D ⟦ p, ccc ⟧
           × total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧,
 isBinProduct (total_category D) ccc ddd (pr1 pp1p2)
   (pr12 pp1p2) (pr22 pp1p2)) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
∑ p : total_category D,
total_category D ⟦ p, ccc ⟧
× total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧
 apply (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
ccc, ddd: total_category D
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : total_category D,
           total_category D ⟦ p, ccc ⟧
           × total_category D ⟦ p, ddd ⟧,
 isBinProduct (total_category D) ccc ddd (pr1 pp1p2)
   (pr12 pp1p2) (pr22 pp1p2))
  (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs ccc ddd)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
ddd: total_category D
isBinProduct (total_category D) (c,, cc) ddd
  (pr1
     (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs (c,, cc)
        ddd))
  (pr12 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
           (c,, cc) ddd))
  (pr22 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
           (c,, cc) ddd))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
isBinProduct (total_category D) (c,, cc) (d,, dd)
  (pr1
     (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs (c,, cc)
        (d,, dd)))
  (pr12 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
           (c,, cc) (d,, dd)))
  (pr22 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
           (c,, cc) (d,, dd)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
aaa: total_category D
fff: total_category D ⟦ aaa, c,, cc ⟧
ggg: total_category D ⟦ aaa, d,, dd ⟧
∃! fg : total_category D ⟦ aaa,
        pr1
          (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
             (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) ⟧,
fg
· pr12 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
          (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) = fff
× fg
  · pr22 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
            (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) = ggg

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∃! fg : total_category D ⟦ a,, aa,
        pr1
          (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
             (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) ⟧,
fg
· pr12 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
          (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) = f,, ff
× fg
  · pr22 (total_category_Binproducts_data Ps dPs
            (c,, cc) (d,, dd)) = g,, gg

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∃! fg : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
        aa -->[
        f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
             (dPs c d cc dd),
pr1 fg · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
pr2 fg ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
f,, ff
× pr1 fg · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  pr2 fg ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
  g,, gg

g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a

ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
(λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
       aa -->[
       f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
            (dPs c d cc dd),
 pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
 pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
 f,, ff
 × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg) ?x
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∏
y : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
    aa -->[
    f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd),
isaprop
  ((λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
          aa -->[
          f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
               (dPs c d cc dd),
    pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
    pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
               (dPs c d cc dd) = f,, ff
    × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
      pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                 (dPs c d cc dd) = g,, gg) y)

g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∏
y : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
    aa -->[
    f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd),
(λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
       aa -->[
       f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
            (dPs c d cc dd),
 pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
 pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
 f,, ff
 × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg) y → y = ?x

d: C

a: C

g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
aa -->[
f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
 exact (total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs ff gg).

(λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
       aa -->[
       f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
            (dPs c d cc dd),
 pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
 pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
 f,, ff
 × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg)
  (total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps
     dPs ff gg)
 exact (total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism_ok Ps dPs ff gg).

isaprop
  (pr1 y · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 y ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   f,, ff)
 apply (homset_property (total_category D) (a ,, aa) (c ,, cc)).

D: disp_cat C

cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d

g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
y: ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
aa -->[
f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
isaprop
  (pr1 y · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 y ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
∏
y : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
    aa -->[
    f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd),
(λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
       aa -->[
       f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
            (dPs c d cc dd),
 pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
 pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
 f,, ff
 × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg) y
→ y =
  total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
    ff gg
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
fgfgfg: ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
aa -->[
f] dispBinProductObject 
     (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
(λ t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧,
       aa -->[
       f] dispBinProductObject (Ps c d)
            (dPs c d cc dd),
 pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
 pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
 f,, ff
 × pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
   pr2 t ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd) =
   g,, gg) fgfgfg
→ fgfgfg =
  total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
    ff gg

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
Ps: BinProducts C
dPs: dispBinProducts Ps
c: C
cc: D c
d: C
dd: D d
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (c,, cc) ⟧
ff: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ f] pr2 (c,, cc)
g: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, aa), pr1 (d,, dd) ⟧
gg: pr2 (a,, aa) -->[ g] pr2 (d,, dd)
fg: C ⟦ a, Ps c d ⟧
fgfg: aa -->[
fg] dispBinProductObject 
      (Ps c d) (dPs c d cc dd)
pr1 (fg,, fgfg) · BinProductPr1 C (Ps c d),,
pr2 (fg,, fgfg) ;; dispBinProductPr1 (Ps c d)
                     (dPs c d cc dd) = f,, ff
× pr1 (fg,, fgfg) · BinProductPr2 C (Ps c d),,
  pr2 (fg,, fgfg) ;; dispBinProductPr2 (Ps c d)
                       (dPs c d cc dd) = g,, gg
→ fg,, fgfg =
  total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism Ps dPs
    ff gg

        exact (total_category_Binproducts_mediating_morphism_unique Ps dPs ff gg fgfg).
  Defined.


(** ** analogously for terminal objects *)

  Definition is_dispTerminal (P : Terminal C) (pp : D (TerminalObject P)) : UU :=
    ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a), iscontr (aa -->[TerminalArrow P a] pp).

  Definition dispTerminal (P : Terminal C) : UU :=
    ∑ pp :  D (TerminalObject P), is_dispTerminal P pp.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
dispTerminal P

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
dispTerminal P

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
is_dispTerminal P dTO_data

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
a: C
aa: D a
iscontr (aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
a: C
aa: D a
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
a: C
aa: D a
(λ cntr : aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data,
 ∏ t : aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data, t = cntr)
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
a: C
aa: D a
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
 exact (mediating a aa).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
LP: locally_propositional D
dTO_data: D P
mediating: ∏ (a : C) (aa : D a),
aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data
a: C
aa: D a
(λ cntr : aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data,
 ∏ t : aa -->[ TerminalArrow P a] dTO_data, t = cntr)
  (mediating a aa)
 intro; apply LP.
  Defined.

  Definition dispTerminalObject {P : Terminal C} (dP : dispTerminal P) : D (TerminalObject P) := pr1 dP.

  Definition is_dispTerminal_dispTerminal (P : Terminal C) (dP : dispTerminal P) :
    is_dispTerminal P (dispTerminalObject dP) := pr2 dP.

  Definition dispTerminalArrow (P : Terminal C) (dP : dispTerminal P) {a : C} (aa : D a) :
    aa -->[TerminalArrow P a] dispTerminalObject dP := pr1 (is_dispTerminal_dispTerminal P dP a aa).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
x: C
xx: D x
kk: xx -->[ TerminalArrow P x] dispTerminalObject dP
kk = dispTerminalArrow P dP xx

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
x: C
xx: D x
kk: xx -->[ TerminalArrow P x] dispTerminalObject dP
kk = dispTerminalArrow P dP xx

    apply (pr2 (pr2 dP x xx)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
kk: xx -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
kk =
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispTerminalObject dP))
  (TerminalArrowUnique P x f)
  (dispTerminalArrow P dP xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
kk: xx -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
kk =
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispTerminalObject dP))
  (TerminalArrowUnique P x f)
  (dispTerminalArrow P dP xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
kk: xx -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
transportb (mor_disp xx (dispTerminalObject dP))
  (! TerminalArrowUnique P x f) kk =
dispTerminalArrow P dP xx

    apply dispTerminalArrowUnique.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f, g: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
gg: aa -->[ g] dispTerminalObject TT
ff =
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (TerminalArrowEq f g) gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f, g: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
gg: aa -->[ g] dispTerminalObject TT
ff =
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (TerminalArrowEq f g) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
ff =
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (idpath f) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
ff = gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (TerminalArrowUnique T a f)
  (dispTerminalArrow T TT aa) = gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: Terminal C
TT: dispTerminal T
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, T ⟧
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject TT
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (TerminalArrowUnique T a f)
  (dispTerminalArrow T TT aa) =
transportb (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject TT))
  (TerminalArrowUnique T a f)
  (dispTerminalArrow T TT aa)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
Terminal (total_category D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
Terminal (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
total_category D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
(λ a : total_category D,
 isTerminal (total_category D) a) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
total_category D
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
D P

      exact (dispTerminalObject dP).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
(λ a : total_category D,
 isTerminal (total_category D) a)
  (P,, dispTerminalObject dP)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
aaa: total_category D
iscontr
  (total_category D ⟦ aaa, P,, dispTerminalObject dP ⟧)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
iscontr
  (total_category D ⟦ a,, aa,
   P,, dispTerminalObject dP ⟧)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
∃! f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧, aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧, aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
(λ cntr : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧,
          aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP,
 ∏
 t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧,
     aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP, t = cntr) ?pr1

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧, aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
 exact (TerminalArrow P a,, dispTerminalArrow P dP aa).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
(λ cntr : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧,
          aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP,
 ∏
 t : ∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧,
     aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP, t = cntr)
  (TerminalArrow P a,, dispTerminalArrow P dP aa)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
fff: ∑ f : C ⟦ a, P ⟧, aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
fff = TerminalArrow P a,, dispTerminalArrow P dP aa

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, P ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
f,, ff = TerminalArrow P a,, dispTerminalArrow P dP aa

        
C: category

P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, P ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP

C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, P ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
transportf (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject dP)) ?Goal
  ff = dispTerminalArrow P dP aa

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, P ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
f = TerminalArrow P a
 apply TerminalArrowUnique.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
P: Terminal C
dP: dispTerminal P
a: C
aa: D a
f: C ⟦ a, P ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] dispTerminalObject dP
transportf (mor_disp aa (dispTerminalObject dP))
  (TerminalArrowUnique P a f) ff =
dispTerminalArrow P dP aa
 apply dispTerminalArrowUnique.
  Defined.

  (**
   Displayed equalizers
   *)
  Definition is_disp_Equalizer
             {x y : C}
             {f g : x --> y}
             (e : Equalizer f g)
             {xx : D x}
             {yy : D y}
             {ff : xx -->[ f ] yy}
             {gg : xx -->[ g ] yy}
             (ee : D e)
             (ar_e : ee -->[ EqualizerArrow e ] xx)
             (pp : transportf
                     (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                     (EqualizerEqAr e)
                     (ar_e ;; ff)
                   =
                   ar_e ;; gg)
    : UU
    := ∏ (w : C)
         (ww : D w)
         (h : w --> x)
         (hh : ww -->[ h ] xx)
         (q : h · f = h · g)
         (qq : transportf
                 (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                 q
                 (hh ;; ff)
               =
               hh ;; gg),
       ∃! (ii : ww -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q ] ee),
       transportf
         (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
         (EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
         (ii ;; ar_e)
       =
       hh.

  Definition disp_Equalizer
             {x y : C}
             {f g : x --> y}
             {xx : D x}
             {yy : D y}
             (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
             (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy)
             (e : Equalizer f g)
    : UU
    := ∑ (ee : D e)
         (ar_e : ee -->[ EqualizerArrow e ] xx)
         (pp : transportf
                 (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                 (EqualizerEqAr e)
                 (ar_e ;; ff)
               =
               ar_e ;; gg),
       is_disp_Equalizer e ee ar_e pp.

  Definition disp_Equalizers
             (EC : Equalizers C)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C)
         (f g : x --> y)
         (xx : D x)
         (yy : D y)
         (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
         (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy),
       disp_Equalizer ff gg (EC x y f g).

  Section TotalEqualizer.
    Context {x y : C}
            {f g : x --> y}
            {xx : D x}
            {yy : D y}
            (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
            (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy)
            (e : Equalizer f g)
            (ee : disp_Equalizer ff gg e).

    Let t_x : total_category D
      := x ,, xx.

    Let t_y : total_category D
      := y ,, yy.

    Let t_f : t_x --> t_y
      := f ,, ff.

    Let t_g : t_x --> t_y
      := g ,, gg.

    Let t_e : total_category D
      := _ ,, pr1 ee.

    Let t_i : t_e --> t_x
      := _ ,, pr12 ee.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
t_i · t_f = t_i · t_g

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
t_i · t_f = t_i · t_g

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
pr1 (t_i · t_f) = pr1 (t_i · t_g)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_y)) ?p
  (pr2 (t_i · t_f)) = pr2 (t_i · t_g)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
pr1 (t_i · t_f) = pr1 (t_i · t_g)
 apply EqualizerEqAr.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_y))
  (EqualizerEqAr e) (pr2 (t_i · t_f)) =
pr2 (t_i · t_g)
 apply (pr122 ee).
    Qed.

    Section TotalEqualizerUMP.
      Context {w : C}
              {ww : D w}
              {h : w --> x}
              (hh : ww -->[ h ] xx).

      Let t_w : total_category D
        := w ,, ww.

      Let t_h : t_w --> t_x
        := h ,, hh.

      Context (t_q : t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g).

      Let q : h · f = h · g
        := base_paths _ _ t_q.

      Let qq
        : transportf
            (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
            q
            (hh ;; ff)
          = hh ;; gg
       := fiber_paths t_q.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = t_h)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = t_h)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = t_h)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧, x · t_i = t_h)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧, x · t_i = t_h)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
x0: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧
isaprop (x0 · t_i = t_h)

          apply homset_property.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

D: disp_cat C

hh: ww -->[ h] xx

  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g

qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_e)) ?p (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr11 φ₁ · EqualizerArrow e =
pr11 φ₂ · EqualizerArrow e

          exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂))).
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_e))
  (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_e))
  (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q

            exact (isEqualizerInUnique
                     _ _ _ _
                     (pr22 e)
                     _ _ _
                     (pr11 φ₂)
                     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂))).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_e))
  (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_e))
  (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁))) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e)
     (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
     (pr21 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e) r (pr21 φ₂)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
(λ ii : ww -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q] pr1 ee,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
   (EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (ii ;; pr12 ee) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
(λ ii : ww -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q] pr1 ee,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
   (EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (ii ;; pr12 ee) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
(λ ii : ww -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q] pr1 ee,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
   (EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (ii ;; pr12 ee) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_e ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 t_e)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ww -->[ z] pr1 ee)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)) ;; pr12 ee) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
        (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r)
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ww -->[ z] pr1 ee)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁) ;; pr12 ee)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r @
   EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ww -->[ z] pr1 ee)
     (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
     (pr21 φ₁) ;; pr12 ee) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r @
   EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (EqualizerArrow e)
        (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))))
     (pr21 φ₁ ;; pr12 ee)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerArrow e)
     (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
   cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r @
   EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (pr21 φ₁ ;; pr12 ee) =
hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerArrow e)
     (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
   cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r @
   EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (pr21 φ₁ ;; pr12 ee) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_x ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ x] pr2 t_x)
  (base_paths (pr1 φ₁ · t_i) t_h (pr2 φ₁))
  (pr2 (pr1 φ₁ · t_i))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
  (EqualizerArrow e)
  (EqualizerInsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂) (EqualizerIn e w h q)
  (EqualizerArrow e) r @ EqualizerCommutes e w h q =
base_paths (pr1 φ₁ · t_i) t_h (pr2 φ₁)

            apply homset_property.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
(λ ii : ww -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q] pr1 ee,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
   (EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (ii ;; pr12 ee) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r (pr21 φ₂))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 ee)) r (pr21 φ₂) ;; pr12 ee) =
hh

D: disp_cat C

f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (EqualizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww xx)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, ww -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (EqualizerIn e w h q) (EqualizerArrow e) r @
   EqualizerCommutes e w h q) (pr21 φ₂ ;; pr12 ee) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 t_x ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ x] pr2 t_x)
  (base_paths (pr1 φ₂ · t_i) t_h (pr2 φ₂))
  (pr2 (pr1 φ₂ · t_i))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧,
φ · t_i = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = EqualizerIn e w h q
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂) (EqualizerIn e w h q)
  (EqualizerArrow e) r @ EqualizerCommutes e w h q =
base_paths (pr1 φ₂ · t_i) t_h (pr2 φ₂)

            apply homset_property.
      Qed.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_e ⟧

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g

qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
pr2 t_w -->[ EqualizerIn e w h q] pr2 t_e

        exact (pr11 (pr222 ee w ww h hh q qq)).
      Defined.

D: disp_cat C

  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_x)) ?p
  (pr2 (total_EqualizerIn · t_i)) = pr2 t_h

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
pr1 (total_EqualizerIn · t_i) = pr1 t_h
 apply EqualizerCommutes.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_w, t_x ⟧
t_q: t_h · t_f = t_h · t_g
q:= base_paths (t_h · t_f) (t_h · t_g) t_q: h · f = h · g
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy) q
  (hh ;; ff) = hh ;; gg
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 t_x))
  (EqualizerCommutes e w (pr1 t_h) q)
  (pr2 (total_EqualizerIn · t_i)) = pr2 t_h
 exact (pr21 (pr222 ee w ww h hh q qq)).
      Defined.
    End TotalEqualizerUMP.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y

e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
Equalizer t_f t_g

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
?e · t_f = ?e · t_g

t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
isEqualizer t_f t_g ?e ?H

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
total_category D
 exact t_e.

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
 exact t_i.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
t_i · t_f = t_i · t_g
 exact total_Equalizer_path.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
isEqualizer t_f t_g t_i total_Equalizer_path
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
∃! φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
(pr1 h,, pr2 h) · t_f = (pr1 h,, pr2 h) · t_g

          exact q.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C

f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D

w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
