C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
(λ φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h) ?pr1

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧
 exact (total_EqualizerIn (pr2 h) q).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Equalizer f g
ee: disp_Equalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= EqualizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_x ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ w, t_x ⟧
q: h · t_f = h · t_g
(λ φ : total_category D ⟦ w, t_e ⟧, φ · t_i = h)
  (total_EqualizerIn (pr2 h) q)
 exact (total_EqualizerIn_commutes (pr2 h) q).
    Defined.
  End TotalEqualizer.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Equalizers C
DC: disp_Equalizers EC
Equalizers (total_category D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Equalizers C
DC: disp_Equalizers EC
Equalizers (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Equalizers C
DC: disp_Equalizers EC
x, y: total_category D
f, g: total_category D ⟦ x, y ⟧
Equalizer f g

    exact (total_Equalizer
             (pr2 f)
             (pr2 g)
             (EC _ _ (pr1 f) (pr1 g))
             (DC _ _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 f) (pr2 g))).
  Defined.

  (**
   Displayed coequalizers
   *)
  Definition is_disp_Coequalizer
             {x y : C}
             {f g : x --> y}
             (e : Coequalizer f g)
             {xx : D x}
             {yy : D y}
             {ff : xx -->[ f ] yy}
             {gg : xx -->[ g ] yy}
             (ee : D e)
             (ar_e : yy -->[ CoequalizerArrow e ] ee)
             (pp : transportf
                     (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                     (CoequalizerEqAr e)
                     (ff ;; ar_e)
                   =
                   gg ;; ar_e)
    : UU
    := ∏ (w : C)
         (ww : D w)
         (h : y --> w)
         (hh : yy -->[ h ] ww)
         (q : f · h = g · h)
         (qq : transportf
                 (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                 q
                 (ff ;; hh)
               =
               gg ;; hh),
       ∃! (ii : ee -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q ] ww),
       transportf
         (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
         (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
         (ar_e ;; ii)
       =
       hh.

  Definition disp_Coequalizer
             {x y : C}
             {f g : x --> y}
             {xx : D x}
             {yy : D y}
             (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
             (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy)
             (e : Coequalizer f g)
    : UU
    := ∑ (ee : D e)
         (ar_e : yy -->[ CoequalizerArrow e ] ee)
         (pp : transportf
                 (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                 (CoequalizerEqAr e)
                 (ff ;; ar_e)
               =
               gg ;; ar_e),
       is_disp_Coequalizer e ee ar_e pp.

  Definition disp_Coequalizers
             (DC : Coequalizers C)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C)
         (f g : x --> y)
         (xx : D x)
         (yy : D y)
         (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
         (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy),
       disp_Coequalizer ff gg (DC x y f g).

  Section TotalCoequalizer.
    Context {x y : C}
            {f g : x --> y}
            {xx : D x}
            {yy : D y}
            (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
            (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy)
            (e : Coequalizer f g)
            (ee : disp_Coequalizer ff gg e).

    Let t_x : total_category D
      := x ,, xx.

    Let t_y : total_category D
      := y ,, yy.

    Let t_f : t_x --> t_y
      := f ,, ff.

    Let t_g : t_x --> t_y
      := g ,, gg.

    Let t_e : total_category D
      := _ ,, pr1 ee.

    Let t_i : t_y --> t_e
      := _ ,, pr12 ee.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
t_f · t_i = t_g · t_i

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
t_f · t_i = t_g · t_i

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
pr1 (t_f · t_i) = pr1 (t_g · t_i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_x) (pr2 t_e)) ?p
  (pr2 (t_f · t_i)) = pr2 (t_g · t_i)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
pr1 (t_f · t_i) = pr1 (t_g · t_i)
 apply CoequalizerEqAr.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_x) (pr2 t_e))
  (CoequalizerEqAr e) (pr2 (t_f · t_i)) =
pr2 (t_g · t_i)
 apply (pr122 ee).
    Qed.

    Section TotalCoequalizerUMP.
      Context {w : C}
              {ww : D w}
              {h : y --> w}
              (hh : yy -->[ h ] ww).

      Let t_w : total_category D
        := w ,, ww.

      Let t_h : t_y --> t_w
        := h ,, hh.

      Context (t_q : t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h).

      Let q : f · h = g · h
        := base_paths _ _ t_q.

      Let qq
        : transportf
            (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
            q
            (ff ;; hh)
          = gg ;; hh
       := fiber_paths t_q.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧, t_i · φ = t_h)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧, t_i · φ = t_h)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧, t_i · φ = t_h)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧, t_i · x = t_h)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧, t_i · x = t_h)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
x0: total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧
isaprop (t_i · x0 = t_h)

          apply homset_property.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y

ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww

  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_w)) ?p (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧

ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww

  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
CoequalizerArrow e · pr11 φ₁ =
CoequalizerArrow e · pr11 φ₂

          exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂))).
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q

            exact (isCoequalizerOutUnique
                     _ _ _ _
                     (pr22 e)
                     _ _ _
                     (pr11 φ₂)
                     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂))).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_e) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁))) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
     (pr21 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r (pr21 φ₂)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
(λ ii : pr1 ee -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
   (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; ii) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
(λ ii : pr1 ee -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
   (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; ii) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
(λ ii : pr1 ee -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
   (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; ii) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_e, pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 t_e -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (pr12 ee ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r
                (transportf
                   (λ z : C ⟦ e, w ⟧,
                    pr1 ee -->[ z] ww)
                   (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁)
                      (pr11 φ₂)
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
                   (pr21 φ₁))) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp yy ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r)
     (pr12 ee ;; transportf
                   (λ z : C ⟦ e, w ⟧,
                    pr1 ee -->[ z] ww)
                   (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁)
                      (pr11 φ₂)
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
                   (pr21 φ₁))) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (pr12 ee ;; transportf
                (λ z : C ⟦ e, w ⟧, pr1 ee -->[ z] ww)
                (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁)
                   (pr11 φ₂)
                   (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂)))
                (pr21 φ₁)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp yy ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e))
        (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))))
     (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₁)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e))
     (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₁) =
hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e))
     (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₁) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_y, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_y -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths (t_i · pr1 φ₁) t_h (pr2 φ₁))
  (pr2 (t_i · pr1 φ₁))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e))
  (CoequalizerOutsEq e (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ ! pr2 φ₂))) @
maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
CoequalizerCommutes e w h q =
base_paths (t_i · pr1 φ₁) t_h (pr2 φ₁)

            apply homset_property.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
(λ ii : pr1 ee -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
   (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; ii) = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))

D: disp_cat C

xx: D x

t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (pr12 ee ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ee) ww) r
                (pr21 φ₂)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (CoequalizerCommutes e w h q)
  (transportf (mor_disp yy ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r)
     (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₂)) = hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₂) =
hh

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
   CoequalizerCommutes e w h q) (pr12 ee ;; pr21 φ₂) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_y, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 t_y -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths (t_i · pr1 φ₂) t_h (pr2 φ₂))
  (pr2 (t_i · pr1 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧,
t_i · φ = t_h
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoequalizerOut e w h q
maponpaths (compose (CoequalizerArrow e)) r @
CoequalizerCommutes e w h q =
base_paths (t_i · pr1 φ₂) t_h (pr2 φ₂)

            apply homset_property.
      Qed.

D: disp_cat C

qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
total_category D ⟦ t_e, t_w ⟧

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
pr2 t_e -->[ CoequalizerOut e w h q] pr2 t_w

        exact (pr11 (pr222 ee w ww h hh q qq)).
      Defined.

  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_y) (pr2 t_w)) ?p
  (pr2 (t_i · total_CoequalizerOut)) = pr2 t_h

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
pr1 (t_i · total_CoequalizerOut) = pr1 t_h
 apply CoequalizerCommutes.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: C
ww: D w
h: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
hh: yy -->[ h] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_h:= h,, hh: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_w ⟧
t_q: t_f · t_h = t_g · t_h
q:= base_paths (t_f · t_h) (t_g · t_h) t_q: f · h = g · h
qq:= fiber_paths t_q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww) q
  (ff ;; hh) = gg ;; hh
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_y) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoequalizerCommutes e w (pr1 t_h) q)
  (pr2 (t_i · total_CoequalizerOut)) = pr2 t_h
 exact (pr21 (pr222 ee w ww h hh q qq)).
      Defined.
    End TotalCoequalizerUMP.

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧

Coequalizer t_f t_g

 exact t_e.

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
t_f · t_i = t_g · t_i
 exact total_Coequalizer_path.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
isCoequalizer t_f t_g t_i total_Coequalizer_path
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
∃! φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧, t_i · φ = h

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D

t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
isaprop
  (∑ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧, t_i · φ = h)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D

w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
t_f · (pr1 h,, pr2 h) = t_g · (pr1 h,, pr2 h)

          exact q.

D: disp_cat C

C: category
D: disp_cat C

f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

q: t_f · h = t_g · h
total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
(λ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧, t_i · φ = h) ?pr1

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧
 exact (total_CoequalizerOut (pr2 h) q).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
e: Coequalizer f g
ee: disp_Coequalizer ff gg e
t_x:= x,, xx: total_category D
t_y:= y,, yy: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ t_x, t_y ⟧
t_e:= e,, pr1 ee: total_category D
t_i:= CoequalizerArrow e,, pr12 ee: total_category D ⟦ t_y, t_e ⟧
w: total_category D
h: total_category D ⟦ t_y, w ⟧
q: t_f · h = t_g · h
(λ φ : total_category D ⟦ t_e, w ⟧, t_i · φ = h)
  (total_CoequalizerOut (pr2 h) q)
 exact (total_CoequalizerOut_commutes (pr2 h) q).
    Defined.
  End TotalCoequalizer.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Coequalizers C
DC: disp_Coequalizers EC
Coequalizers (total_category D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Coequalizers C
DC: disp_Coequalizers EC
Coequalizers (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
EC: Coequalizers C
DC: disp_Coequalizers EC
x, y: total_category D
f, g: total_category D ⟦ x, y ⟧
Coequalizer f g

    exact (total_Coequalizer
             (pr2 f)
             (pr2 g)
             (EC _ _ (pr1 f) (pr1 g))
             (DC _ _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 f) (pr2 g))).
  Defined.

  (**
   Type-indexed products
   *)
  Section FixType.
    Context (I : UU).

    Definition disp_isProduct
               {d : I → C}
               (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i))
               (p : Product I C d)
               (pp : D p)
               (ππ : ∏ (i : I), pp -->[ ProductPr _ _ p i ] dd i)
      : UU
      := ∏ (w : C)
           (ww : D w)
           (f : ∏ (i : I), w --> d i)
           (ff : ∏ (i : I), ww -->[ f i ] dd i),
         ∃! (hh : ww -->[ ProductArrow _ _ p f ] pp),
         ∏ (i : I),
         transportf
           (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
           (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ p _ f i)
           (hh ;; ππ i)
         =
         ff i.

    Definition disp_Product
               {d : I → C}
               (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i))
               (p : Product I C d)
      : UU
      := ∑ (pp : D p)
           (ππ : ∏ (i : I), pp -->[ ProductPr _ _ p i ] dd i),
         disp_isProduct dd p pp ππ.

    Definition disp_Products
               (PC : Products I C)
      : UU
      := ∏ (d : I → C)
           (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i)),
         disp_Product dd (PC d).

    Section TotalProduct.
      Context (d_dd : I → total_category D).

      Let d : I → C
        := λ i, pr1 (d_dd i).

      Let dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i)
        := λ i, pr2 (d_dd i).

      Context (p : Product I C d)
              (pp : disp_Product dd p).

      Definition total_category_Product
        : total_category D
        := _ ,, pr1 pp.

      Definition total_category_ProductPr
                 (i : I)
        : total_category_Product --> d_dd i
        := _ ,, pr12 pp i.

      Section TotalProductUMP.
        Context {w : C}
                (ww : D w)
                {f : ∏ (i : I), w --> d i}
                (ff : ∏ (i : I), ww -->[ f i ] dd i).

        Let t_w : total_category D
          := w ,, ww.

        Let t_f : ∏ (i : I), t_w --> d_dd i
          := λ i, f i ,, ff i.

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, total_category_Product
       ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, total_category_Product
       ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w, total_category_Product
       ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
         total_category_Product ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, x · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p

t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
         total_category_Product ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, x · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
x: total_category D ⟦ t_w, total_category_Product ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ i : I, x · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
x: total_category D ⟦ t_w, total_category_Product ⟧
t: I
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : I, x · total_category_ProductPr t = t_f t) t)

            apply homset_property.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 total_category_Product)) 
  ?p (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
∏ i : I,
pr11 φ₁ · ProductPr I C p i =
pr11 φ₂ · ProductPr I C p i

    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
i: I
pr11 φ₁ · ProductPr I C p i =
pr11 φ₂ · ProductPr I C p i

            exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ !(pr2 φ₂ i))).

  (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 total_category_Product))
  (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

D: disp_cat C
I: UU

ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i

φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 total_category_Product))
  (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 total_category_Product))
  (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
     (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧

φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product
               ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product)
        (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
           (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁))) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
     (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)

pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
      pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product)
     (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
     (pr21 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product) r
  (pr21 φ₂)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : ww -->[ ProductArrow I C p f] pr1 pp,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
   (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
   (hh ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product
               ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product)
        (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
           (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : ww -->[ ProductArrow I C p f] pr1 pp,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
   (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
   (hh ;; (pr12 pp) i) = 
 ff i) (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r (pr21 φ₂))

D: disp_cat C

 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
   (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
   (hh ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 total_category_Product
               ⟧,
         pr2 t_w -->[ z] pr2 total_category_Product)
        (ProductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)

D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C

transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r

        (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i0 : I,

D: disp_cat C
