t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (dd i))
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
        (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r)
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, p ⟧, ww -->[ z] pr1 pp)
        (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁) ;; (pr12 pp) i)) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, p ⟧, ww -->[ z] pr1 pp)
     (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
     (pr21 φ₁) ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (dd i))
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (ProductPr I C p i)
        (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))))
     (pr21 φ₁ ;; (pr12 pp) i)) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductPr I C p i)
     (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
   cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (pr21 φ₁ ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductPr I C p i)
     (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
   cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (pr21 φ₁ ;; (pr12 pp) i) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 (d_dd i) ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ x] pr2 (d_dd i))
  (base_paths (pr1 φ₁ · total_category_ProductPr i)
     (t_f i) (pr2 φ₁ i))
  (pr2 (pr1 φ₁ · total_category_ProductPr i))

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
  (ProductPr I C p i)
  (ProductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
  (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i =
base_paths (pr1 φ₁ · total_category_ProductPr i)
  (t_f i) (pr2 φ₁ i)

              apply homset_property.
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : ww -->[ ProductArrow I C p f] pr1 pp,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
   (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
   (hh ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r (pr21 φ₂))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
∏ i : I,
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r (pr21 φ₂) ;; 
   (pr12 pp) i) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 pp)) r (pr21 φ₂) ;; 
   (pr12 pp) i) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (dd i))
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
        (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r)
     (pr21 φ₂ ;; (pr12 pp) i)) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (pr21 φ₂ ;; (pr12 pp) i) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, d i ⟧, ww -->[ z] dd i)
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
     (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
   ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (pr21 φ₂ ;; (pr12 pp) i) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 t_w, pr1 (d_dd i) ⟧,
   pr2 t_w -->[ x] pr2 (d_dd i))
  (base_paths (pr1 φ₂ · total_category_ProductPr i)
     (t_f i) (pr2 φ₂ i))
  (pr2 (pr1 φ₂ · total_category_ProductPr i))

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ t_w,
    total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, φ · total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = ProductArrow I C p f
i: I
cancel_postcomposition (pr11 φ₂)
  (ProductArrow I C p f) (ProductPr I C p i) r @
ProductPrCommutes I C d p w f i =
base_paths (pr1 φ₂ · total_category_ProductPr i)
  (t_f i) (pr2 φ₂ i)

              apply homset_property.
        Qed.

        Definition total_category_ProductArrow
          : t_w --> total_category_Product
          := _ ,, pr11 (pr22 pp w ww f ff).

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
total_category_ProductArrow
· total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
total_category_ProductArrow
· total_category_ProductPr i = t_f i

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
pr1
  (total_category_ProductArrow
   · total_category_ProductPr i) = pr1 (t_f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 (d_dd i))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (total_category_ProductArrow
      · total_category_ProductPr i)) = 
pr2 (t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
pr1
  (total_category_ProductArrow
   · total_category_ProductPr i) = pr1 (t_f i)
 exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ p _ _ i).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ w, d i ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, ww -->[ f i] dd i
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ t_w, d_dd i ⟧
i: I
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 t_w) (pr2 (d_dd i)))
  (ProductPrCommutes I C d p (pr1 t_w) f i)
  (pr2
     (total_category_ProductArrow
      · total_category_ProductPr i)) = pr2 (t_f i)
 exact (pr21 (pr22 pp w ww f ff) i).
        Qed.
      End TotalProductUMP.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
isProduct I (total_category D) d_dd
  total_category_Product total_category_ProductPr

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
isProduct I (total_category D) d_dd
  total_category_Product total_category_ProductPr

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
∃! fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product
         ⟧,
∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product
         ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
∑
fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product
         ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i)
 apply total_category_ProductUnique.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
∑
fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product ⟧,
∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
(λ fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product
         ⟧,
 ∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i) 
  ?pr1

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product ⟧
 exact (total_category_ProductArrow (pr2 w) (λ i, pr2 (f i))).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Product I C d
pp: disp_Product dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ w, d_dd i ⟧
(λ fap : total_category D ⟦ w, total_category_Product
         ⟧,
 ∏ i : I, fap · total_category_ProductPr i = f i)
  (total_category_ProductArrow (pr2 w)
     (λ i : I, pr2 (f i)))
 exact (total_category_ProductPrCommutes (pr2 w) (λ i, pr2 (f i))).
      Defined.
    End TotalProduct.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
Products I (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
Products I (total_category D)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
Product I (total_category D) d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
total_category D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ ?c, d i ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
isProduct I (total_category D) d ?c ?f

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
total_category D
 exact (total_category_Product d _ (DC _ _)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
∏ i : I,
total_category D
⟦ total_category_Product d (PC (λ i0 : I, pr1 (d i0)))
    (DC (λ i0 : I, pr1 (d i0)) (λ i0 : I, pr2 (d i0))),
d i ⟧
 exact (total_category_ProductPr d _ (DC _ _)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Products I C
DC: disp_Products PC
d: I → total_category D
isProduct I (total_category D) d
  (total_category_Product d (PC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)))
     (DC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)) (λ i : I, pr2 (d i))))
  (total_category_ProductPr d
     (PC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)))
     (DC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)) (λ i : I, pr2 (d i))))
 apply total_category_isProduct.
    Defined.
  End FixType.

  (**
   Displayed binary coproducts
   *)
  Definition disp_isBinCoproduct
             {x y : C}
             {xx : D x}
             {yy : D y}
             (p : BinCoproduct x y)
             (pp : D p)
             (ιι₁ : xx -->[ BinCoproductIn1 p ] pp)
             (ιι₂ : yy -->[ BinCoproductIn2 p ] pp)
    : UU
    := ∏ (w : C)
         (ww : D w)
         (f : x --> w)
         (ff : xx -->[ f ] ww)
         (g : y --> w)
         (gg : yy -->[ g ] ww),
       ∃! (hh : pp -->[ BinCoproductArrow p f g ] ww),
       (transportf
          (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
          (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ p _ f g)
          (ιι₁ ;; hh)
        =
        ff)
       ×
       (transportf
          (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
          (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ p _ f g)
          (ιι₂ ;; hh)
        =
        gg).

  Definition disp_BinCoproduct
             {x y : C}
             (xx : D x)
             (yy : D y)
             (p : BinCoproduct x y)
    : UU
    := ∑ (pp : D p)
         (ιι₁ : xx -->[ BinCoproductIn1 p ] pp)
         (ιι₂ : yy -->[ BinCoproductIn2 p ] pp),
       disp_isBinCoproduct p pp ιι₁ ιι₂.

    Definition disp_BinCoproducts
               (PC : BinCoproducts C)
      : UU
      := ∏ (x y : C)
           (xx : D x)
           (yy : D y),
         disp_BinCoproduct xx yy (PC x y).

    Section TotalBinCoproduct.
      Context (x_xx y_yy : total_category D).

      Let x : C := pr1 x_xx.
      Let y : C := pr1 y_yy.
      Let xx : D x := pr2 x_xx.
      Let yy : D y := pr2 y_yy.

      Context (p : BinCoproduct x y)
              (pp : disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p).

      Definition total_category_BinCoproduct
        : total_category D
        := _ ,, pr1 pp.

      Definition total_category_BinCoproductIn1
        : x_xx --> total_category_BinCoproduct
        := _ ,, pr12 pp.

      Definition total_category_BinCoproductIn2
        : y_yy --> total_category_BinCoproduct
        := _ ,, pr122 pp.

      Section TotalBinCoproductUMP.
        Context {w : C}
                (ww : D w)
                {f : x --> w}
                (ff : xx -->[ f ] ww)
                {g : y --> w}
                (gg : yy -->[ g ] ww).

        Let t_w : total_category D
          := w ,, ww.
        Let t_f : x_xx --> t_w
          := f ,, ff.
        Let t_g : y_yy --> t_w
          := g ,, gg.

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fg : total_category D
        ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fg : total_category D
        ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   fg : total_category D
        ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D
         ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · x = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · x = t_g)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C

pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧

g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D
         ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · x = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · x = t_g)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
x0: total_category D ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct,
t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · x0 = t_f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · x0 = t_g)

            use isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D

y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct)
     (pr2 t_w)) ?p (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
BinCoproductIn1 p · pr11 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 p · pr11 φ₂
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
BinCoproductIn2 p · pr11 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn2 p · pr11 φ₂

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
BinCoproductIn1 p · pr11 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 p · pr11 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂))).
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
BinCoproductIn2 p · pr11 φ₁ =
BinCoproductIn2 p · pr11 φ₂
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂))).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct)
     (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w) (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂) (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧

g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g

D: disp_cat C

gg: yy -->[ g] ww

     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,

r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct)
     (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p 
     (pr1 t_w) (pr11 φ₁) 
     (pr11 φ₂) (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) 
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,

f = f

D: disp_cat C

ww: D w

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct)
     (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w) (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂) (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
pr21 φ₂

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct)
     (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w) (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂) (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) (pr21 φ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct, pr1 t_w
         ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
            pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     r (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct, pr1 t_w
         ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
            pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[
         z] pr2 t_w)
        (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w)
           (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁))) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct, pr1 t_w
         ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
            pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     r (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct, pr1 t_w
         ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
            pr1 t_w ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w) (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
     (pr21 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct, pr1 t_w
         ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (pr21 φ₂)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ BinCoproductArrow p f g] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
   (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
   (pr12 pp ;; hh) = ff
 × transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
     (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
     (pr122 pp ;; hh) = gg)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[
         z] pr2 t_w)
        (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w)
           (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ BinCoproductArrow p f g] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
   (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
   (pr12 pp ;; hh) = ff
 × transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
     (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
     (pr122 pp ;; hh) = gg)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ BinCoproductArrow p f g] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
   (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
   (pr12 pp ;; hh) = ff
 × transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
     (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
     (pr122 pp ;; hh) = gg)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_BinCoproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_BinCoproduct -->[
         z] pr2 t_w)
        (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p (pr1 t_w)
           (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
           (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                (transportf
                   (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                    pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                   (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                      (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                   (pr21 φ₁))) = ff
× transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
    (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
    (pr122 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                       pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                      (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                         (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                         (maponpaths pr1
                            (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                         (maponpaths pr1
                            (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                      (pr21 φ₁))) = gg

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                (transportf
                   (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                    pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                   (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                      (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                   (pr21 φ₁))) = ff
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr122 pp ;; transportf 
                 (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                     pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                    (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                       (pr11 φ₁) 
                       (pr11 φ₂)
                       (maponpaths pr1
                        (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                       (maponpaths pr1
                        (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                    (pr21 φ₁))) = gg

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                (transportf
                   (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                    pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                   (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                      (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                      (maponpaths pr1
                         (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                   (pr21 φ₁))) = ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p)) r)
     (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
        (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p))
           (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
              (pr11 φ₂)
              (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
              (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))))
        (pr12 pp ;; pr21 φ₁))) = ff

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p))
     (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; pr21 φ₁) = ff

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p))
     (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; pr21 φ₁) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 x_xx, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 x_xx -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · pr1 φ₁) t_f
     (pr12 φ₁))
  (pr2 (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · pr1 φ₁))

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p)) r @
BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g =
base_paths (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · pr1 φ₁)
  t_f (pr12 φ₁)

                apply homset_property.
              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr122 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                     pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                    (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w
                       (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                       (maponpaths pr1
                          (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
                       (maponpaths pr1
                          (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂)))
                    (pr21 φ₁))) = gg
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp yy ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r)
     (transportf (mor_disp yy ww)
        (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p))
           (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
              (pr11 φ₂)
              (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
              (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))))
        (pr122 pp ;; pr21 φ₁))) = gg

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p))
     (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr122 pp ;; pr21 φ₁) = gg

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p))
     (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
        (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
   maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr122 pp ;; pr21 φ₁) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 y_yy, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 y_yy -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₁) t_g
     (pr22 φ₁))
  (pr2 (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₁))

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p))
  (BinCoproductArrowsEq C x y p w (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 φ₁ @ ! pr22 φ₂))) @
maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r @
BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g =
base_paths (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₁)
  t_g (pr22 φ₁)

                apply homset_property.
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ BinCoproductArrow p f g] ww,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
   (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
   (pr12 pp ;; hh) = ff
 × transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
     (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
     (pr122 pp ;; hh) = gg)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧

fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,

× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g

transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                (pr21 φ₂)) = ff
× transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
    (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
    (pr122 pp ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                   (pr21 φ₂)) = gg

                (pr21 φ₂)) = ff

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn1 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr12 pp ;; pr21 φ₂) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 x_xx, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 x_xx -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · pr1 φ₂) t_f
     (pr12 φ₂))
  (pr2 (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · pr1 φ₂))

× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p

ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r @
   BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g)
  (pr122 pp ;; pr21 φ₂) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 y_yy, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 y_yy -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₂) t_g
     (pr22 φ₂))
  (pr2 (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₂))

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
fg : total_category D
     ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, t_w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = t_f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = t_g
r: pr11 φ₂ = BinCoproductArrow p f g
maponpaths (compose (BinCoproductIn2 p)) r @
BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f g =
base_paths (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · pr1 φ₂)
  t_g (pr22 φ₂)

                apply homset_property.
        Qed.

        Definition total_category_BinCoproductArrow
          : total_category_BinCoproduct --> t_w
          := _ ,, pr11 (pr222 pp w ww f ff g gg).

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
total_category_BinCoproductIn1
· total_category_BinCoproductArrow = t_f

transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x_xx) (pr2 t_w)) 
  ?p

     (total_category_BinCoproductIn1
      · total_category_BinCoproductArrow)) =

   · total_category_BinCoproductArrow) = pr1 t_f
 apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x_xx) (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C x y p w (pr1 t_f) g)
  (pr2
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn1
      · total_category_BinCoproductArrow)) = pr2 t_f
 exact (pr121 (pr222 pp w ww f ff g gg)).
        Qed.

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
total_category_BinCoproductIn2
· total_category_BinCoproductArrow = t_g

pr1
  (total_category_BinCoproductIn2
   · total_category_BinCoproductArrow) = pr1 t_g
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww

t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 y_yy) (pr2 t_w)) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn2
      · total_category_BinCoproductArrow)) = 
pr2 t_g

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
pr1
  (total_category_BinCoproductIn2
   · total_category_BinCoproductArrow) = pr1 t_g
 apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: C
ww: D w
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] ww
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
gg: yy -->[ g] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= f,, ff: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, t_w ⟧
t_g:= g,, gg: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, t_w ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 y_yy) (pr2 t_w))
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes C x y p w f (pr1 t_g))
  (pr2
     (total_category_BinCoproductIn2
      · total_category_BinCoproductArrow)) = pr2 t_g
 exact (pr221 (pr222 pp w ww f ff g gg)).
        Qed.
      End TotalBinCoproductUMP.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
isBinCoproduct (total_category D) x_xx y_yy
  total_category_BinCoproduct
  total_category_BinCoproductIn1
  total_category_BinCoproductIn2

y:= pr1 y_yy: C

yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, w ⟧
g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧
∃! fg : total_category D
        ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, w ⟧,
total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = f
× total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = g

isaprop

   fg : total_category D
        ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, w ⟧,
   total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · fg = f
   × total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · fg = g)

 apply total_category_BinCoproductUnique.

g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧

yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, w ⟧
g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧
(λ _ : total_category_BinCoproductIn1 · ?pr1 = f,
 total_category_BinCoproductIn2 · ?pr1 = g) 
  ?pr10

D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D

y:= pr1 y_yy: C

yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y

g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧
total_category D ⟦ total_category_BinCoproduct, w ⟧
 exact (total_category_BinCoproductArrow (pr2 w) (pr2 f) (pr2 g)).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, w ⟧
g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧
total_category_BinCoproductIn1
· total_category_BinCoproductArrow (pr2 w) (pr2 f)
    (pr2 g) = f
 apply total_category_BinCoproductArrowIn1.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x_xx, y_yy: total_category D
x:= pr1 x_xx: C
y:= pr1 y_yy: C
xx:= pr2 x_xx: D x
yy:= pr2 y_yy: D y
p: BinCoproduct x y
pp: disp_BinCoproduct xx yy p
w: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x_xx, w ⟧
g: total_category D ⟦ y_yy, w ⟧
(λ _ : total_category_BinCoproductIn1
       · total_category_BinCoproductArrow (pr2 w)
           (pr2 f) (pr2 g) = f,
 total_category_BinCoproductIn2
 · total_category_BinCoproductArrow (pr2 w) (pr2 f)
     (pr2 g) = g)
  (total_category_BinCoproductArrowIn1 (pr2 w) (pr2 f)
     (pr2 g))
 apply total_category_BinCoproductArrowIn2.
      Defined.
    End TotalBinCoproduct.

D: disp_cat C
PC: BinCoproducts C
DC: disp_BinCoproducts PC
BinCoproducts (total_category D)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
PC: BinCoproducts C
DC: disp_BinCoproducts PC
x, y: total_category D
total_category D
 exact (total_category_BinCoproduct
                 x y
                 (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
                 (DC _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y))).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
PC: BinCoproducts C
DC: disp_BinCoproducts PC
x, y: total_category D
total_category D ⟦ x,
total_category_BinCoproduct x y (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
  (DC (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧
 exact (total_category_BinCoproductIn1
                 x y
                 (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
                 (DC _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y))).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
PC: BinCoproducts C
DC: disp_BinCoproducts PC
x, y: total_category D
total_category D ⟦ y,
total_category_BinCoproduct x y (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
  (DC (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) ⟧
 exact (total_category_BinCoproductIn2
                 x y
                 (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
                 (DC _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y))).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
PC: BinCoproducts C
DC: disp_BinCoproducts PC
x, y: total_category D
isBinCoproduct (total_category D) x y
  (total_category_BinCoproduct x y
     (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
     (DC (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (total_category_BinCoproductIn1 x y
     (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
     (DC (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
  (total_category_BinCoproductIn2 x y
     (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
     (DC (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))
 exact (total_category_isBinCoproduct
                 x y
                 (PC (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
                 (DC _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y))).
    Defined.

  (**
   Displayed coproducts indexed over arbitrary types
   *)
  Section FixType.
    Context (I : UU).

    Definition disp_isCoproduct
               {d : I → C}
               (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i))
               (p : Coproduct I C d)
               (pp : D p)
               (ππ : ∏ (i : I), dd i -->[ CoproductIn _ _ p i ] pp)
      : UU
      := ∏ (w : C)
           (ww : D w)
           (f : ∏ (i : I), d i --> w)
           (ff : ∏ (i : I), dd i -->[ f i ] ww),
         ∃! (hh : pp -->[ CoproductArrow _ _ p f ] ww),
         ∏ (i : I),
         transportf
           (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
           (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ p _ f i)
           (ππ i ;; hh)
         =
         ff i.

    Definition disp_Coproduct
               {d : I → C}
               (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i))
               (p : Coproduct I C d)
      : UU
      := ∑ (pp : D p)
           (ππ : ∏ (i : I), dd i -->[ CoproductIn _ _ p i ] pp),
         disp_isCoproduct dd p pp ππ.

    Definition disp_Coproducts
               (PC : Coproducts I C)
      : UU
      := ∏ (d : I → C)
           (dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i)),
         disp_Coproduct dd (PC d).

    Section TotalCoproduct.
      Context (d_dd : I → total_category D).

      Let d : I → C
        := λ i, pr1 (d_dd i).

      Let dd : ∏ (i : I), D (d i)
        := λ i, pr2 (d_dd i).

      Context (p : Coproduct I C d)
              (pp : disp_Coproduct dd p).

      Definition total_category_Coproduct
        : total_category D
        := _ ,, pr1 pp.

      Definition total_category_CoproductIn
                 (i : I)
        : d_dd i --> total_category_Coproduct
        := _ ,, pr12 pp i.

      Section TotalCoproductUMP.
        Context {w : C}
                (ww : D w)
                {f : ∏ (i : I), d i --> w}
                (ff : ∏ (i : I), dd i -->[ f i ] ww).

        Let t_w : total_category D
          := w ,, ww.

        Let t_f : ∏ (i : I), d_dd i --> t_w
          := λ i, f i ,, ff i.

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
       t_w ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
       t_w ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
       t_w ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
φ₁ = φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
         t_w ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · x = t_f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
isPredicate
  (λ x : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
         t_w ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · x = t_f i)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
x: total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, t_w ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · x = t_f i)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
x: total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, t_w ⟧
t: I
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : I, total_category_CoproductIn t · x = t_f t)
     t)

            apply homset_property.

C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_Coproduct) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧

φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_Coproduct) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoproductArrow_eq I C 
     (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁) 
     (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

i: I
pr1 (t_f i) =

D: disp_cat C
I: UU

p: Coproduct I C d

t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧

φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,

∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i

f i = CoproductIn I C p i · CoproductArrow I C p f

D: disp_cat C

t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧

φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
