              apply idpath.
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_Coproduct) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) = pr21 φ₂

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 total_category_Coproduct) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
     (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
  (pr21 φ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w
            ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
     (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w
            ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
           (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁))) =
transportb
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w
            ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
     (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w
            ⟧,
      pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
     (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
        (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
     (pr21 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct, pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w) r
  (pr21 φ₂)

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ CoproductArrow I C p f] ww,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
   (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
   ((pr12 pp) i ;; hh) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
           (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ CoproductArrow I C p f] ww,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
   (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
   ((pr12 pp) i ;; hh) = 
 ff i) (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ CoproductArrow I C p f] ww,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
   (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
   ((pr12 pp) i ;; hh) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ pr1 total_category_Coproduct,
               pr1 t_w ⟧,
         pr2 total_category_Coproduct -->[ z] pr2 t_w)
        (CoproductArrow_eq I C (pr1 t_w) p (pr11 φ₁)
           (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
        (pr21 φ₁)))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
∏ i : I,
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                        pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                       (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p
                          (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                          (λ i0 : I,
                           maponpaths pr1
                             (pr2 φ₁ i0 @ ! pr2 φ₂ i0)))
                       (pr21 φ₁))) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                        pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                       (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p
                          (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                          (λ i : I,
                           maponpaths pr1
                             (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
                       (pr21 φ₁))) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp (dd i) ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r)
     ((pr12 pp) i ;; transportf
                       (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                        pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                       (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p
                          (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                          (λ i : I,
                           maponpaths pr1
                             (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
                       (pr21 φ₁))) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
   CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; transportf
                    (λ z : C ⟦ p, w ⟧,
                     pr1 pp -->[ z] ww)
                    (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p
                       (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
                       (λ i : I,
                        maponpaths pr1
                          (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i)))
                    (pr21 φ₁)) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
   CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  (transportf (mor_disp (dd i) ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i))
        (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
           (λ i : I,
            maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))))
     ((pr12 pp) i ;; pr21 φ₁)) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i))
     (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
   maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
   CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; pr21 φ₁) = ff i

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i))
     (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
        (λ i : I,
         maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
   maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
   CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; pr21 φ₁) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 (d_dd i), pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 (d_dd i) -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₁)
     (t_f i) (pr2 φ₁ i))
  (pr2 (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₁))

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i))
  (CoproductArrow_eq I C w p (pr11 φ₁) (pr11 φ₂)
     (λ i : I, maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ i @ ! pr2 φ₂ i))) @
maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i =
base_paths (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₁)
  (t_f i) (pr2 φ₁ i)

              apply homset_property.
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
(λ hh : pr1 pp -->[ CoproductArrow I C p f] ww,
 ∏ i : I,
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
   (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
   ((pr12 pp) i ;; hh) = ff i)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r (pr21 φ₂))

∏ i : I,
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; transportf (mor_disp (pr1 pp) ww) r
                    (pr21 φ₂)) = ff i

C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ d i, w ⟧, dd i -->[ z] ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
   CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i)
  ((pr12 pp) i ;; pr21 φ₂) =
transportf
  (λ x : C ⟦ pr1 (d_dd i), pr1 t_w ⟧,
   pr2 (d_dd i) -->[ x] pr2 t_w)
  (base_paths (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₂)
     (t_f i) (pr2 φ₂ i))
  (pr2 (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₂))

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct,
    t_w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · φ = t_f i
r: pr11 φ₂ = CoproductArrow I C p f
i: I
maponpaths (compose (CoproductIn I C p i)) r @
CoproductInCommutes I C d p w f i =
base_paths (total_category_CoproductIn i · pr1 φ₂)
  (t_f i) (pr2 φ₂ i)

              apply homset_property.
        Qed.

        Definition total_category_CoproductArrow
          : total_category_Coproduct --> t_w
          := _ ,, pr11 (pr22 pp w ww f ff).

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
total_category_CoproductIn i
· total_category_CoproductArrow = t_f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
total_category_CoproductIn i
· total_category_CoproductArrow = t_f i

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
pr1
  (total_category_CoproductIn i
   · total_category_CoproductArrow) = pr1 (t_f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (d_dd i)) (pr2 t_w)) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (total_category_CoproductIn i
      · total_category_CoproductArrow)) = 
pr2 (t_f i)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
pr1
  (total_category_CoproductIn i
   · total_category_CoproductArrow) = pr1 (t_f i)
 exact (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ p _ _ i).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: C
ww: D w
f: ∏ i : I, C ⟦ d i, w ⟧
ff: ∏ i : I, dd i -->[ f i] ww
t_w:= w,, ww: total_category D
t_f:= λ i : I, f i,, ff i: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, t_w ⟧
i: I
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (d_dd i)) (pr2 t_w))
  (CoproductInCommutes I C d p (pr1 t_w) f i)
  (pr2
     (total_category_CoproductIn i
      · total_category_CoproductArrow)) = pr2 (t_f i)
 exact (pr21 (pr22 pp w ww f ff) i).
        Qed.
      End TotalCoproductUMP.

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
isCoproduct I (total_category D) d_dd
  total_category_Coproduct total_category_CoproductIn

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
isCoproduct I (total_category D) d_dd
  total_category_Coproduct total_category_CoproductIn

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
∃! g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w
       ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w
       ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
∑
g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w
       ⟧,
   ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i)
 apply total_category_CoproductUnique.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
∑
g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w ⟧,
∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
(λ g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w
       ⟧,
 ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i) 
  ?pr1

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w ⟧
 exact (total_category_CoproductArrow (pr2 w) (λ i, pr2 (f i))).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
d_dd: I → total_category D
d:= λ i : I, pr1 (d_dd i): I → C
dd:= λ i : I, pr2 (d_dd i): ∏ i : I, D (d i)
p: Coproduct I C d
pp: disp_Coproduct dd p
w: total_category D
f: ∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d_dd i, w ⟧
(λ g : total_category D ⟦ total_category_Coproduct, w
       ⟧,
 ∏ i : I, total_category_CoproductIn i · g = f i)
  (total_category_CoproductArrow (pr2 w)
     (λ i : I, pr2 (f i)))
 exact (total_category_CoproductInCommutes (pr2 w) (λ i, pr2 (f i))).
      Defined.
    End TotalCoproduct.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
Coproducts I (total_category D)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
Coproducts I (total_category D)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
Coproduct I (total_category D) d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
total_category D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
∏ i : I, total_category D ⟦ d i, ?c ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
isCoproduct I (total_category D) d ?c ?f

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
total_category D
 exact (total_category_Coproduct d _ (DC _ _)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
∏ i : I,
total_category D ⟦ d i,
total_category_Coproduct d (PC (λ i0 : I, pr1 (d i0)))
  (DC (λ i0 : I, pr1 (d i0)) (λ i0 : I, pr2 (d i0))) ⟧
 exact (total_category_CoproductIn d _ (DC _ _)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
I: UU
PC: Coproducts I C
DC: disp_Coproducts PC
d: I → total_category D
isCoproduct I (total_category D) d
  (total_category_Coproduct d
     (PC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)))
     (DC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)) (λ i : I, pr2 (d i))))
  (total_category_CoproductIn d
     (PC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)))
     (DC (λ i : I, pr1 (d i)) (λ i : I, pr2 (d i))))
 apply total_category_isCoproduct.
    Defined.
  End FixType.
End FixDispCat.
